## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare and refine presentation strategy for Adventures Group pitch](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Comprehensive content strategy demo planned, showcasing SEO, CRO, and technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Emphasis on organized approach and infinite content potential to address client's past agency issues](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Presentation structure: follow RFP agenda, use real client examples (e.g., Steadily) to demonstrate growth impact](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Topics

### Presentation Content and Structure

  - [Added weekly reporting slide: data-heavy, showcasing new content, refreshes, SEO testing dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Included CRO work examples (e.g., Reddit stock)](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Technical SEO: 20-page guide prepared for Galileo as example](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Considering addition of "ideas" section to show applicability (e.g., long-tail keyword examples)](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Jimmy created demo table to illustrate organized content strategy approach](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Marcel prepared keyword gap analysis and long-tail keyword examples](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Plan to show Airtable with traffic volumes for keywords](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)

### Client-Specific Strategy

  - [Focus on creating a resource hub for travelers, similar to Steadily's insurance content hub](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Highlight infinite content potential by showcasing keyword volumes (e.g., 2.3M for "Viarta" related keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Demonstrate growth impact using Steadily as case study (from no content to significant growth)](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Presentation Approach

  - [Use slide 32 as agenda/roadmap: content architecture, creation, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Structure: 5 minutes for each of 4 main points, aiming for 15-20 minute total presentation](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Demo Airtable and article generation process](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Narrative shift: position team as starting post-COVID, focusing on recovery and growth](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Marcel: Potential chief of staff hire (Mariana) fell through](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Tiago (Data Grid?): Potential large client ($30-40k/month), Marcel has 1% equity](https://fathom.video/share/MCt3sifRdNKDUSTNQJtmtrbgjw4w_sDS?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

## Next Steps

  - Finalize presentation slides, ensuring comprehensive yet concise content
  - Prepare to demo Airtable and article generation process (possibly using Steadily as example)
  - Review and practice presentation flow, focusing on RFP agenda points
  - Coordinate on who presents which sections during the pitch
